name: Tom Cotton
subject: How we beat Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
If you haven't heard, my friend Jim Bognet is fighting to unseat the most corrupt liberal member of Congress, Matt Cartwright. This race is a DEAD HEAT, making it a priority for the Democrats and a #1 PICKUP OPPORTUNITY for Republicans. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

I'm asking for your help today, and here's why:

I've been fighting for President Trump's agenda to make America great from day one and I have never seen the Democrats lurch so far to the Left as they have today. Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and the Squad are hell-bent on gaining control to push their Socialist agenda on America. We need to fight back harder and louder to stop them in their tracks, starting with picking up a House seat in Pennsylvania.

If you haven't heard, my friend Jim Bognet is fighting to unseat one of the most liberal members of Congress, Matt Cartwright. This race is a DEAD HEAT, making it a priority for the Democrats and a #1 PICKUP OPPORTUNITY for Republicans.

Liberal Matt Cartwright pretends to be a moderate when he campaigns, but the truth is he’s a lap dog for Nancy Pelosi. He supports defunding the police and throwing our brave law enforcement officers under the bus. That’s right—Matt Cartwright, who’s wealthy enough to afford private security, supports getting rid of the police because it won’t affect him. But it will affect you.

If my friend Jim can win, President Trump will gain a vote for border security, law and order, Second Amendment rights, and for taking on China.

It's a tight race, and the future of the country is at stake.

I can speak from experience that it is difficult to beat a liberal incumbent. But that is why I am throwing my support behind Jim. Will you join me to help win back this critical seat?

YES! I’ll donate $5 to help >>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=24&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0

YES! I’ll donate $25 to help >>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0
YES! I’ll donate $50 to help >>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0
YES! I’ll donate $100 to help >>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=27&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0
YES! I’ll donate $250 to help >>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0
YES! I’ll donate $500 to help >>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=25&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0

Every dollar we raise to support Jim's campaign sends a message to the radical left that the American people are fed up with them.

Will you chip in $10, $25, $50 or even $100 to help Jim fight back and flip this seat red? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0

We CANNOT allow Nancy Pelosi to maintain control of the House of Representatives.

I'm counting on you to step up and join me in supporting Jim Bognet today.

DONATE NOW http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=28&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 In service, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNzAwODUS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDMwMDQxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane

name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: Another Incredible Week for the Campaign
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hl37MVBDIIfBCP.&b=P4DTUuT9dyQjba8985ed5Q

Peter

As I'm sure you know, we are exactly two months away from the election, and our campaign is continuing to pick up momentum. For the second weekend in a row, District 32 was home to the largest Freedom Rally in Southern California. Once again, hundreds of patriotic Americans showed up, this time in Glendora, to show their support for our president, our campaign, our brave law enforcement, and of course, freedom. We had a great time and received another outpouring of support from folks at the rally, and from people driving by.

In a different tone of public demonstration, I was also honored to attend and speak at an anti-human trafficking rally put on by a grassroots group in West Covina. This is such a relevant, yet often overlooked cause that I was so proud to be able to discuss with everyone, and reassure my commitment to ending these types of atrocities that have no place in our great nation, or anywhere in the world.

Here are some photos of these recent events:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hl37MVBDIIfBCP.&b=fVKniOFloXyBRNS9ZnZHaA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hl37MVBDIIfBCP.&b=P4DTUuT9dyQjba8985ed5Q

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hl37MVBDIIfBCP.&b=fVKniOFloXyBRNS9ZnZHaA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hl37MVBDIIfBCP.&b=fVKniOFloXyBRNS9ZnZHaA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hl37MVBDIIfBCP.&b=fVKniOFloXyBRNS9ZnZHaA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hl37MVBDIIfBCP.&b=fVKniOFloXyBRNS9ZnZHaA

These amazing events, combined with our amazing teamwork and outreach throughout the district, has brought so much support to our campaign, and we are so excited to keep working hard for these next two months. Please get involved and be a part of our movement. 2020 is the year to join us and be loud!

I hope to see you soon.

Joshua Scott

www.votejoshuascott.org

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hl37MVBDIIfBCP.&b=P4DTUuT9dyQjba8985ed5Q

There are only 61 days left in this election, and every single minute between now and November 3rd counts.

We've got to keep our heads in the game, ignore the fluctuating polls, and keep our foot on the gas to make sure our message reaches every voter across the country.

If you've been looking for the right time to make your first contribution to be able to say you did your part to help defeat Donald Trump, now is the time.

**Every day that you wait to pitch in your first $25 is a day we lose to put your contribution to work to fund critical voter outreach in the battleground states we need to win this election -- so, if you're able to give, we need your support now.**

[Peter, can Joe and Kamala count on you to pitch in $25 to our Founding Donor Fund today? | It's been more than 24 hours since Mowers lied to us on TV last night, still no retraction or apology. [

Matt Mowers had the opportunity to admit he made a mistake in filing his financial disclosure or tell the people of New Hampshire that he had filed an amended disclosure, instead he chose to lie to the people of this great state](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAyNTAyNzM5Nzc3Njg5MzY4JmM9aThmNSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDE0MTc5MTUmZD1oNmY3eDls.L5rCVTvO4T-TmCe2g-Oh0ciUZVfCT_jar5q2XBPELe0).

I'm running for Congress not to be something but to DO something. Helping our veterans that have sacrificed so much, slashing our national debt, supporting our police and military, and reducing regulations and taxes to empower small businesses to flourish....these are the reasons why I'm running for Congress.

The primary is this Tuesday and I wanted to give you the chance to invest in this movement and help us bring victory in the Republican Primary so we can then take on the liberal Chris Pappas. Will you chip in right now?

Friend,
In a city known for talkers, President Trump is a doer.

President Trump is critical to the well-being of our Nation, and it’s going to be up to grassroots supporters, like YOU, to help us secure another VICTORY in November.

subject: Hirsh Singh Challenges Election Fraud in New Jersey’s Primary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
“We have called for the June Primary Election to be thrown out and redone. If the ballots that were legally cast were not counted, they must... | | | Dear Friend,

With the November Elections mere months away, the stakes keep growing higher. And unlike other one-hit-wonder candidates that quit when the going gets rough, I want you to know I'm all in.

We found fraud, and we found that our tyrannical Governor actually violated the U.S. Constitution in a really bad way. They may have to throw the entire Primary Election out due to his violation. I will not let them disenfranchise our voters.

This isn't about any one office or election or even a single victory. The entire fate of our nation hangs in the balance, and so long as I'm able, I will keep fighting on behalf of patriots everywhere.

Please take a moment to check out my team's press release below. The Democrat elites are growing nervous because they're running out of room to maneuver. We're not gonna let up the pressure any time soon.

Sincerely,
Hirsh
---

| September 4th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Hirsh Singh Challenges Election Fraud in New Jersey’s Primary
### _Singh for Senate Campaign Calls on Judge to Throw Out Republican U.S. Senate Primary_

**LINWOOD, NJ** — On Wednesday, September 1st, the Singh for Senate Campaign filed an official contest of the U.S. Senate Primary. One of the key issues in the contest points out that New Jersey Governor Phil Murphy has violated Article 1, Section 4 of the U.S. Constitution by taking it upon himself to arbitrarily impose on the state the manner in which the election is conducted, a power that is vested in the hands of the state legislature. “Phil Murphy arrogating power to himself and acting like a third world dictator should not go unchallenged. New Jersey’s July 7 primary should be seen as a canary in the coal mine. The arbitrary manner in which it was conducted and the cheating by officials including by the Attorney General that accompanied the election process is an ugly preview of the nightmare that President Trump will face in the general election in November as Democrats attempt to steal the election. People should not be forced to vote by mail merely because that is Phil Murphy’s whim,” said Singh. “We have called for the June primary election to be thrown out and redone. If the ballots that were legally cast were not counted, they must throw out the entire election and redo it using machines. We can get results in a single day. We have requested the Judge throw out the entire election due to misconduct, fraud, corruption, illegal votes being counted, and legal votes being rejected,” added Singh. Singh also took aim at the fact that the election has been certified even though the ballots are yet to be counted completely. The Secretary of State’s office randomly certified one of Singh’s opponents as the winner and argued that they would amend the certification if the actual results conflicted with this choice. “The Primary election held on July 7 has been illegitimately certified and the arguments provided by the Secretary of State make a mockery of the laws related to the deadline by which the election process must be completed,” pointed out Singh. The contest points out several irregularities with the counting process as well. Over 40,000 ballots were not counted, over 49,000 people – more than 10% – did not vote for either the President or a U.S. Senate candidate, thousands of people did not receive ballots, and several thousands of people received ballots that were not of their party’s affiliation. There were also several thousands of ballots that were correctly cast, but were incorrectly rejected during the counting process. “Countless numbers of people have reached out directly to our campaign saying that their legally cast ballot was rejected but that they were only informed about it weeks after the election was certified,” said Singh. “Governor Phil Murphy has no idea what he’s doing and I will not stand by as he desecrates our American tradition of free, fair, and transparent elections. This flies in the face of our democratic election process. Every legal vote must be counted to protect our Constitutional Republic from the threat of tyrannical communism resulting from the unilateral actions of a governor drunk on power,” said Singh.
---
| ###
For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=4115c9d1c4&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ab0fdcc14c&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

name: Betsy
subject: Remember this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter, As we head into Labor Day weekend, a time to celebrate with friends and family while showing our sincere appreciation for the contributions of workers and their families, remember to stay safe. If we do our part, we can slow the spread of covid. Some of the most vulnerable people, experiencing the pandemic on the front lines, are members of our workforce. They need our support and need us to do _our_ part to keep them safe. To show some appreciation for all they do and to help our economy get on track, remember to:
* wear a mask
* social distance
* and wash your hands!

It's so easy and goes a long way. If you're looking for what _not_ to do, you can review the recent activities of my opponent: Have fun this weekend & thanks for your support! Stay safe! Team,
**The nonpartisan election forecasters at _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ just upgraded our race to a pure _TOSS-UP!_** [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19006390/246381081/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.04_b1_kravefc_all-nd&refcode2=3384f8b8-caee-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzg0ZjhiOC1jYWVlLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nPuG-BXpT1F7MYufOZNfrvECBBl81-ycSFQVd0Id3Ng=)

It’s been quite the week on Team Eugene:

**First:** Scott Perry launched a blatantly false ad because he knows he can’t win on the merits of his record, so he’s trying to distract from his own failed leadership.

**Then:** President Trump came to Pennsylvania to prop up Republicans like Scott Perry and advocate for a divisive, partisan agenda that hurts the hard-working families of our community.

**Now:** National nonpartisan election forecasters are recognizing the Republican stranglehold on this seat is slipping -- **so they’ve upgraded our race to a pure TOSS-UP!**

name: Grayson for Georgia
subject: The Justice Act
body:
| | | [](http://www.graysonforga.com/?e=5855d13074ae510bef70273231986a0d&utm_source=graysonforga&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_justice_act&n=1)
---
| Dear Friend \-- My proposed Justice Act
* Crooked #Politicians do not win
* #BadCops do not win
* The #PIC (Prison Industrial Complex) does not win

BUT THE #Citizens are #Protected because what has been protected #Evil, will now be #Punished.
1. Any murder that was premeditated; or a murder that involved rape or torture; or a murder that involved a child under the age of 18, the sentence shall be life without parole.
2. Any prosecutor or other law enforcement officer, found to have lied to a judge, jury or withheld evidence in order to gain a conviction, shall be sentenced to 5 years, plus the number of years served by the innocent victim. If the victim was executed or died by an act of violence perpetrated by another inmate, the sentence shall be life.
3. Qualified Immunity shall be abolished.
4. Anyone charged with murder based on circumstantial evidence shall have access to DNA testing.
5. Inmates on death row that were convicted on circumstantial evidence or eyewitness testimony shall have access to DNA testing.
6. Any person that was wrongly convicted shall be compensated for time served based on a formula of lost income potential, plus $250,000 dollars for each year served.
7. Any individuals found to have conspired to murder, frame another person for a crime or lied while testifying under oath, shall be sentenced to 20 years without parole.
8. Any felon found with an illegal firearm shall be sentenced to 5 years for first conviction, 10 for the second and life for the third. Question: Who gets to determine which firearm is legal or illegal?
9. Any person who has been convicted of any crime except murder, rape or child abuse and has completed their sentence and remained a Law-Abiding Citizen for 7 years shall have their records sealed and all rights restored automatically and without request.
10. Tax incentives shall be given to employers who hire persons formerly convicted of crimes.
11. Any crimes not involving a victim of any kind, not involving an act that could lead to injury or death of other persons shall no longer be sentenced to jail or prison.
12. Law Enforcement Officials shall not be used for revenue generation. Certain exemptions for things such as parking tickets or DWIs will be excluded. Technology, where possible and not in violation of our constitutional protections, should be employed instead. This will allow LEOs to focus on violent crimes and it will go far in improving relations with #Citizens.

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend \-- My proposed Justice Act Crooked #Politicians do not win #BadCops do not win The #PIC (Prison Industrial Complex) does not win BUT THE #Citizens are #Protected because what has been protected #Evil, will now be #Punished. 1. Any murder that was premeditated; or a murder that involved rape or torture; or a murder that involved a child under the age of 18, the sentence shall be life without parole. 2. Any prosecutor or other law enforcement officer, found to have lied to a judge, jury or withheld evidence in order to gain a conviction, shall be sentenced to 5 years, plus the number of years served by the innocent victim. If the victim was executed or died by an act of violence perpetrated by another inmate, the sentence shall be life. 3. Qualified Immunity shall be abolished. 4. Anyone charged with murder based on circumstantial evidence shall have access to DNA testing. 5. Inmates on death row that were convicted on circumstantial evidence or eyewitness testimony shall have access to DNA testing. 6. Any person that was wrongly convicted shall be compensated for time served based on a formula of lost income potential, plus $250,000 dollars for each year served. 7. Any individuals found to have conspired to murder, frame another person for a crime or lied while testifying under oath, shall be sentenced to 20 years without parole. 8. Any felon found with an illegal firearm shall be sentenced to 5 years for first conviction, 10 for the second and life for the third. Question: Who gets to determine which firearm is legal or illegal? 9. Any person who has been convicted of any crime except murder, rape or child abuse and has completed their sentence and remained a Law-Abiding Citizen for 7 years shall have their records sealed and all rights restored automatically and without request. 10. Tax incentives shall be given to employers who hire persons formerly convicted of crimes. 11. Any crimes not involving a victim of any kind, not involving an act that could lead to injury or death of other persons shall no longer be sentenced to jail or prison. 12. Law Enforcement Officials shall not be used for revenue generation. Certain exemptions for things such as parking tickets or DWIs will be excluded. Technology, where possible and not in violation of our constitutional protections, should be employed instead. This will allow LEOs to focus on violent crimes and it will go far in improving relations with #Citizens. What are your thoughts? You have a choice starting in October. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: LISA SCHELLER RECEIVES ENDORSEMENT FROM LEHIGH COUNTY DISTRICT ATTORNEY JAMES B. MARTIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
LISA SCHELLER RECEIVES ENDORSEMENT FROM LEHIGH COUNTY DISTRICT ATTORNEY JAMES
B. MARTIN

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Brooke Race

info@schellerforcongress.com

Allentown, Pa. – James Martin, longest serving district attorney in the
history of Lehigh County, endorsed Lisa Scheller this morning in her run for
U.S. Congress. He has been district attorney since January 1998. James has been
elected to five four-year terms back-to-back and has more than 28 years of
experience as a prosecutor.

James Martin had this to say about Lisa:

“As a prosecutor and a Republican for over two decades, I've admired Lisa’s
no-nonsense, ethical leadership in her time as Lehigh County Commissioner and
in running her business. Lisa Scheller is the leader the people of the Lehigh
Valley deserve. She believes in protecting the American dream and knows how to
get the economy going again. Lisa is a problem-solver who is among a new
generation of leaders here in the Lehigh Valley. She is the best candidate for
the 7th congressional district and is a fighter that will fight to end the
dysfunction that is Washington.”

Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.
Unsubscribe
<http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=68993a6a2e57457a92d5ef7e76b7a3b2&_t=jF27DbjVQCgabsPSMYJIiLByXYO6VDU81MnPetSS1xjHy84cEa5NprtKAxp-_rHov0-kmDt-6_tsksR8BdCAg4eC5kp-c0bi6Qp524lzpBtuefYkaugD0Z3Cbqa9DClWci9Yr7B03Das-nGbWBpSjYFk4UKfHwxaVahLCz5gjr8%3D>

name: Jason Yates
subject: Did you see us on Fox News?
body:
| | My Faith Votes Launches Our Church Votes Initiative
---
[ ](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200904apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200904apl01nd&n=1)
| Peter, I’m not sure if you saw it, but Fox News covered the release of our brand new program, _Our Church Votes! (Check out the article_[ _here_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7ER5tuZG2gAxhFb8PG8WMjDLA45v7zQw7pC20FH5s89LaVa6uSPF1FvmztdJli-Sf_3xxPEc7lCLDC02x7Uo7oA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200904apl01nd&n=2) _.)_ And the past few weeks have been such a whirlwind for our team because dozens of pastors and churches across the nation are now reaching out asking for our support and help to help them host voter registration drives and encourage their members to _Think. Pray. Vote._ [National Voter Registration Sunday](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNElvZOspC_AA5USuqBlKgAR&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200904apl01nd&n=3) is just around the corner, September 20, 2020. We are working hard to ensure as many churches participate as possible. **And now is the time.** As you can tell by the constant TV commercials, digital ads, and cable news reports, November is almost here and secular progressives are pulling out all of the stops to ensure America is never the same. Their goal is a _Post Christian_ America. An America where our...
* Churches and their community ministries are shut down, permanently
* Children are told that their biological sex is fluid and fed dangerous artificial-hormones without their parents ever knowing
* Tax dollars fund abortions up until the moment of birth

Peter, **I believe with all my heart this is what’s at stake this November.** That’s why my team and I are doing EVERYTHING in our power possible to ensure that the 15 million Christians who are not registered to vote do so and head to the polls this fall. We’re promoting National Voter Registration Sunday and Our Church Votes to as many Christians and church leaders as possible. Would you please consider doing two simple things to impact the November elections?
1. Share National Voter Registration Sunday, September 20, 2020, with your Pastor today [https://www.voterregistrationsunday.org/](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNElvZOspC_AA5USuqBlKgAR&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200904apl01nd&n=4)
2. Consider making a donation to My Faith Votes. We**need your support.**

**[For only $3.20](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200904apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200904apl01nd&n=5)** , our team at _My Faith Votes_ can reach, educate, and empower one, new Christian voter. It’s an amazing value. But, we have**MILLIONS** of Christians we have to reach and time is running out. Did you know that most states close the opportunity for citizens to register to vote by the end of September? That means, **we only have about four weeks.** So, **[can you prayerfully consider chipping in right now with a gift of $32, $64, or $160 dollars that will help me reach and equip 10, 20, or 50 new Christian voters?](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200904apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200904apl01nd&n=6)** Too much is on the line for the future of our children, our families, and our nation this November. Truly, thank you for your commitment to _Think. Pray. Vote._ and for your unwavering support of our mission at My Faith Votes _._ [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200904apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200904apl01nd&n=7) While many of us may be concerned about the state of our nation right now, we know He has already won the victory for us. And our task is simply to remain faithful to what He’s calling us to do. Thank you for allowing me to remain faithful to His call, **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200904apl01nd&n=8)
---

name: Jon Ossoff HQ | Atlanta, GA
subject: Fwd: The Election is already here, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Jon's in pole position, but he needs your help. |
---
Friend, the Election has already begun.

**As Jon said yesterday, because the ongoing pandemic necessitates early voting and voting by mail, we're not just eyeing Election Day on November 3 -- _we're focused on an entire Election Season._**

Right now, Jon is in pole position to win this race in Georgia and give Democrats control of the U.S. Senate. _In fact, CNN just ranked the race as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip this year!_

**Jon's momentum has gotten the attention of Mitch McConnell.** His super PAC, which has already spent more to defeat Jon than any other Democratic Senate candidate, just reserved an _additional $6.1 million of advertising spending in Georgia_.

**Georgia voters will start casting their ballots just a couple of weeks from now, friend.[Will you chip in $25 RIGHT NOW to make sure Jon's anti-corruption message is heard loud and clear amid the attack ads McConnell is bankrolling.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2b92/5b2c1286/38902e95/25f0f56f/3935523671/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_03_twomnths?refcode=em_2020_09_04_twomnths_k&amount=25")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Some big news - there will be a debate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ae46d7752b8c/some-big-news-there-will-be-a-debate?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I wanted to make sure that you were among the first to hear the news: my opponent, Adam Kinzinger, has just agreed to participate in our first debate! This is great news because I know that when the voters of the Illinois 16th see my policies and values compared side-by-side with Kinzinger, they will know who is _really_ fighting for them. Throughout the campaign, I have always said that**I am willing to debate Kinzinger anytime, anyplace**. So when my team was contacted about having a debate on September 26th, we agreed right away. **[In celebration of our September 26th debate, can you chip in $26?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2fa730c282&e=140a9b81e7)** The debate will take place at 9 am on Saturday, September 26th. It will be hosted by WCMY Radio. You can tune in at 1430 AM, at [1430wcmy.com](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=628fb49b81&e=140a9b81e7), or watch live on WCMY’s [Facebook page](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ca14b5e6fe&e=140a9b81e7). Also, I’ll let you in on a secret: an incumbent doesn’t challenge their opponent to a debate if they are winning. Kinzinger knows that we have a good shot at unseating him this November. He is worried - which is why he is campaigning and spending money on ads for the first time in a decade. I need your help. My opponent may be airing ads thanks to money from corporate PACs and special interest groups, but I have refused dirty money since day one. I rely on people like you - people who believe in our message - to fund this campaign. [**Click here to help us get on the air. **](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=77a6a16748&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

subject: We Need Leadership Focused On Our Planet

body:
**The Great American Outdoors Act, signed last month, will be the boost Arizona 's tourism needs, while protecting our public lands, supporting our overall economy, and protecting the environment. **

During these especially challenging times, it is vital that we make investments that protect our resources, create jobs, and provide environmental sustainability--not just for us, but for our children, and their children too.

He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. name: Team Kathy
subject: NEWSLETTER: Updates from Kathy Manning, Democratic Candidate for NC-06
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Updates from Kathy Manning, Democratic Candidate for NC-06 | |
---

[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb72/1970169699/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.kathymanningfornc.com/")

|
---
|
---
| |
---
MESSAGE FROM KATHY
---
With all that we are seeing in the news lately, from the use of the White House for the Republican National Convention, to another brutal shooting of a black man by a police officer, to the continuing increase in COVID-19 cases particularly on college campuses, it's hard not to be angry, discouraged, even depressed. The good news is there is something we can do with those feelings: we can harness that energy into positive action to get people out to vote. We have the power to make sure Donald Trump doesn't serve another four years in the White House and save our democracy at the same time. We must do everything we can over the next 60 days to GET OUT THE VOTE! Read below to see how and why we all need to work harder than ever from now till November 3rd.

|
---

| | |
---
| STATE NEWS
---
[_**Gov. Cooper says NC will enter Phase 2.5 of reopening; gyms can reopen**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb73/1970169699/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://myfox8.com/news/gov-cooper-says-nc-will-enter-phase-2-5-of-reopening/") [_**NC Senate passes COVID-19 relief bill with $335 checks for parents**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb70/1970169699/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.newsobserver.com/news/politics-government/article245416500.html?")
|
---

| | |
---
| COVID-19 UPDATE
---

A potentially toxic mix: a controversial new White House Coronavirus Advisor and an example of what can happen when a president rushes a vaccine to market:

[_**A New Coronavirus Adviser Roils the White House With Unorthodox Ideas**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb71/1970169699/VEsC/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/09/02/us/politics/trump-scott-atlas-coronavirus.html?referringSource=articleShare") [_**Gerald Ford Rushed Out a Vaccine. It Was a Fiasco.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb6e/1970169699/VEsD/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/09/02/opinion/coronavirus-vaccine-trump.html?referringSource=articleShare")

|
---

| | |
---
| TOWN HALLS
---
**SAVE THE DATE**

We'll host our next Town Hall on Thursday, September 17th with NC Attorney General Josh Stein! _**[RSVP HERE.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb6f/1970169699/VEsA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/s/rsvp-town-hall-with-josh-stein-kathy-manning")**_

There are three NC Supreme Court Justices up for election this year - which means that fair and independent courts are on the ballot. [_**Sign up to join a virtual town hall with Chief Justice Cheri Beasley, Judge Lucy Inman, and Judge Mark Davis on Tuesday, September 29 at 7:00pm.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb6c/1970169699/VEsB/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZEtdeirrzgsGtYoPTrNE53gFWABA80Gd4kM") Last week I hosted a virtual town hall with former U.S. General Services Administrator Denise Turner Roth. We discussed opportunities for investment in transportation and broadband infrastructure, and support for small businesses in the Triad.
|
---

| | |
---
| **NATIONAL NEWS**
---
[_**Hard to believe that Donald Trump compares police officers who shoot black men with golfers who miss a putt - but in Donald 's world, truth is stranger than fiction.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb6d/1970169699/VEsO/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/live/2020/09/01/us/trump-vs-biden?referringSource=articleShare&referringSource=articleShare") [_**Room rentals, resort fees and furniture removal: How Trump 's company charged the U.S. government more than $900,000.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb6a/1970169699/VEsP/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/trump-company-secret-service-spending/2020/08/27/9331bd86-de36-11ea-8051-d5f887d73381_story.html") [_**Workers Keeping Americans Fed Are Going Hungry in the Heartland.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb6b/1970169699/VEsHBQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.bloomberg.com/features/2020-hunger-minnesota-pandemic/")

|
---

| | |
---
| HOW TO VOTE
---

Worried about Voting? North Carolina Attorney General Josh Stein Gives Tips on Voting Safely. [_**WATCH.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb68/1970169699/VEsHBA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://twitter.com/joshstein_/status/1291790465373818881?s=12")

DON'T DELAY! Request an absentee ballot NOW online. _**[CLICK HERE.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb69/1970169699/VEsHBw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://votebymail.ncsbe.gov/app/home")**_
Or visit: **[Guilford County](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb66/1970169699/VEsHBg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.guilfordcountync.gov/our-county/board-of-elections/absentee-voting-information/absentee-by-mail-ballot")** : (336) 641-3836
_**[Forsyth County](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb67/1970169699/VEsHAQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.forsyth.cc/Elections/")**_ : (336) 703-2800

|

| | |
---
| ECONOMIC RECOVERY
---
As virus rages, US economy struggles to sustain a recovery. [_**CONTINUE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb64/1970169699/VEsHAA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.newsobserver.com/news/article245300145.html") If it's all about the economy, Trump should be in big trouble: Trump boasts about a great economic record. Too bad it's Obama's. [_**CONTINUE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb65/1970169699/VEsHAw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/trump-boasts-about-a-great-economic-record-too-bad-its-obamas/2020/08/31/1eebc59a-ebb8-11ea-b4bc-3a2098fc73d4_story.html")

|

| | |

| RACE AND AMERICA
---
You don't need to be black to be outraged. You need to be American and be outraged. [_**WATCH.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb62/1970169699/VEsHAg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://lincolnproject.us/video/doc/") [_**Anti-Racism Resources**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb63/1970169699/VEsHDQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1BRlF2_zhNe86SGgHa6-VlBO-QgirITwCTugSfKie5Fs/preview?pru=AAABcpqQHMA*baBqF-GFzodOQM_Uzz7bDQ")

| WOMEN LEADERS SPEAK OUT
---
Kamala Harris: Voting is the best way to honor generations of women who paved the way for me. [_**READ MORE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb60/1970169699/VEsHDA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/kamala-harris-womens-equality-day-19th-amendment/2020/08/25/7c268a82-e704-11ea-97e0-94d2e46e759b_story.html") Susan Rice: Trump Isn't Here to Serve the People. [_**READ MORE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb61/1970169699/VEsEBQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/09/01/opinion/trump-corruption-democracy.html")

[_**1619**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb9e/1970169699/VEsEBA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2019/08/23/podcasts/1619-slavery-anniversary.html") [_**Can He Do That**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb9f/1970169699/VEsEBw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/can-he-do-that/id1198238095?i=1000489358332") [_**Nice White Parents**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb9c/1970169699/VEsEBg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/07/30/podcasts/nice-white-parents-serial.html") [_**Women belong in the House**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a0/3d199a51/2fb924a3/7364bb9d/1970169699/VEsEAQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/women-belong-in-the-house/id1435089907?i=1000488021148")

| WHAT'S NEW WITH TEAM KATHY

Meet our new and returning team members:

Sam Hyman - back by popular demand, Sam is heading our volunteer efforts as we ramp up voter contact efforts.

Carolyn Calder - Carolyn is joining Team Kathy as a Deputy Finance Director for the remainder of the 2020 cycle. She will be staffing Kathy during call time, helping to plan and organize fundraisers, and assisting Kathy and the finance team in supporting other candidates across NC!

name: Biden-Harris 2020
subject: a country that lives up to its Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We know our nation can't stay in its current condition. |
---
Peter,

Declaring this election a battle for the soul of the nation sounds heavy, we know. But given everything at stake this time around, it is impossible to overstate the importance of electing Joe Biden and Kamala Harris on November 3.

**And with just 60 days until Election Day, we 're depending on our grassroots supporters more than ever.** [Can you chip in your first $25 to help power our campaign through Election Day?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.04_B1_constitution_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.04_B1_constitution_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Peter, at this point, we know the playbook of Donald Trump and the Republican Party: more fear, more lies, more division. One of Trump's top advisors, Kellyanne Conway, said _out loud and on camera_ that "chaos and anarchy" were proving that Trump is the "clear choice on who's best on public safety and law and order." It seems she's forgotten that Trump is the sitting president, and he's already mismanaging both.

**We know our nation can 't stay in its current condition, Peter. Building Back Better means a stronger America for everybody, a country that _lives up to its Constitution_ , as simple as that may sound.**

[We cannot risk the consequences of Donald Trump's second term, but we've only got 60 days to turn out every vote we can. Peter, will you donate your first $25 and officially stand with the Biden-Harris ticket?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.04_B1_constitution_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.04_B1_constitution_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Biden-Harris 2020
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1c3/1cd0ac28/159892f09/35701703/438015041/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1c3/1cd0ac28/159892f09/35701702/438015041/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1c3/1cd0ac28/159892f09/35701701/438015041/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1c3/1cd0ac28/159892f09/35701700/438015041/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1c3/1cd0ac28/159892f09/357017ff/438015041/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1c3/1cd0ac28/159892f09/357017fe/438015041/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1c3/1cd0ac28/159892f09/357017fd/438015041/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

| Friends,

Today is Mariannette and Curt's 37th wedding anniversary!

We would like to take this day to celebrate Mariannette and Curt for their service to our country, to the great State of Iowa, and for hundreds of hours of work in dedication to this campaign.

We want to surprise Mariannette & Curt today by getting as many $37 donations as possible. Will you help us out by donating one dollar for every year Mariannette and Curt have been married?

name: MJ Hegar
subject: I was shot down in combat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
The President thinks that makes me a loser.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fb2/7f51f7bc/422fac78/4efac348/1742240536/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | When I read the article yesterday about what our Commander-in-Chief said about wounded and dead soldiers, my stomach dropped. I saw the faces of so many people I lost in my aircraft flashing through my mind.

I medevac'd soldiers off the battlefield in Afghanistan. Soldiers wounded so gravely that their lives would never be the same because of their injuries -- and soldiers who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country, whose families would forever have a void that can never be filled. Our Commander-in-Chief thinks that they're suckers.

I'm one of the pilots that got shot down in combat. After we were shot down, my crew and I managed to get our patients to safety. I strapped myself to the skids of our rescue helicopter and returned fire on the Taliban fighters. Our Commander-in-Chief thinks that makes me a loser.

It's not about the name calling. That's not the part that makes me sick. It's the fact that this Commander-in-Chief makes decisions about when and how to deploy our troops -- and he has absolutely no respect for their courage, and no regard for the sacrifice.

It's sickening, but this isn't surprising. Anyone who has paid any attention to Donald Trump over the last few years saw him disparage patriot John McCain, denigrate the Gold Star family of Captain Humayun Khan, disrespect and discredit transgender military members, and steal funds from our military bases for his border wall. The list goes on, and on, and on.

**Yet my opponent, John Cornyn, refuses to take a stand for our troops. Still.**

In the hours after this was reported, Senator Cornyn tweeted seven times. Not once did he mention the President's comments. Not once did he stand up for the 164,234 active duty military members here in Texas.

Who will hold Donald Trump accountable? Unfortunately, it's not going to be John Cornyn. He's let the President get away with it... again, and again, and again.

It's on us.

This is a call to action to every patriot across the country: The time is now to stand up for the next generation putting on the uniform. We need to send a resounding message that this is unacceptable -- to send that message at the polls, and hold our leaders accountable.

Our country is counting on you to answer the call. Thanks,
MJ
| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fb2/7f51f7bc/422fac78/4efac34f/1742240536/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200904.1nd__2063__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fb2/7f51f7bc/422fac78/4efac34e/1742240536/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2063&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fb2/7f51f7bc/422fac78/4efac34d/1742240536/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fb2/7f51f7bc/422fac78/4efac34c/1742240536/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").
---

We need to send a resounding message that this is unacceptable -- to send that message at the polls, and hold our leaders accountable. Our country is counting on you to answer the call. Thanks, MJ | "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

name: Margaret Good
subject: losers?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19011051/246459542/-940294256?refcode=090420-es-heroes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQ4MTdlNy1lNWVlLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_h3tclS5UxDMPpp7i26ZhJlszF749k7pLzchjKR13GI=&emci=788571e0-e5ee-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=74d817e7-e5ee-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)

If you haven’t seen the latest news, President Trump called members of our military who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our nation “losers” and “suckers.”
Friend,

If you haven’t seen the latest news, President Trump called members of our military who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our nation “losers” and “suckers.”

This attack is personal to me. I come from a Gold Star family. My great-grandfather served in WWI. My grandfather served in WWII. My uncle gave his life serving in Vietnam. I could never imagine a President would say they were “losers.”

Trump’s words are a slap in the face to the families of our fallen heroes and a disgrace to their memories and to our entire nation — a nation which has been protected by the members of our armed forces who valiantly sacrificed everything to protect our freedoms.

I know you stand with me in support of our veterans, our fallen heroes, and their families.

Margaret

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! Right now, Kara is leading vulnerable Congressman Don Bacon by just one point.

The GOP is terrified they'll lose this seat - and Bacon's steady vote for their reckless agenda.

They're determined to defeat Kara, spending $58,921 this week alone on attack ads.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e839/77d4c309/2193d5aa/2635eb6e/1652522594/VEsEBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e839/77d4c309/2193d5aa/2635eb69/1652522594/VEsEBA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e839/77d4c309/2193d5aa/2635eb68/1652522594/VEsEBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

subject: 60 Days Until Election Day
body:
Are you in this fight with to elect Joe Biden in November? | | | |
---
|
---
| [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=139cad536e&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in ")
---
| | |
### Friend,

There are now just **60 days** until the most important day of 2020: Election Day.
Winning the presidency is not enough. There is too much at stake and we need to ensure that Joe Biden will get to work in January with a Democratic Congress. Moms in Office is privileged to endorse a number of working mothers this year, from seasoned standouts like California Rep. Katie Porter, to Texas Newcomer Candace Valenzuela. This year, progressive leaders and policies that finally benefit people like us are on the ballot. **These are exactly the kind of women need in the House so that they can vote YES on Biden’s women’s agenda next year.** We couldn’t champion these outstanding women without you. Because of your support, Moms in Office has become a leading organization in small-dollar donations received amongst similar democratic groups. Like never before, we have an opportunity, as voters and as a country: Allow this dangerous administration to further set us back, or give all we can to put those who represent us exactly where they belong. **Can you chip in today and split a contribution between Joe Biden and Moms in Office?** Just [$10](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a763c087e4&e=3f151f8b74) will get us closer to our goal. Thank you for all of your help!

Moms in Office

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I'm excited to talk to Attorney General Eric Holder next week. Can you join?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We'll talk civil rights, voting rights, and state leadership.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5) Friend, With vote-by-mail, we've tried to make voting as easy as possible in Washington state because we know that when all of us can vote more easily and more securely, our democracy is better for it. And I know just the person to talk to about the subject: former Attorney General Eric Holder. He's spent his career fighting to expand voting rights, especially in areas that are historically marginalized. We've seen what happens when we take our eye off the ball: Voters are being purged from the rolls in Georgia and Wisconsin, and Texas has instituted strict voter ID laws. **I'm excited to talk to Attorney General Holder about all this and more next Thursday, September 10, at 5:30 p.m. PT / 8:30 p.m. ET.[Can you join us, too? Donate $15 or whatever you can, and you can RSVP to join us for this fascinating conversation on Zoom.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10998?t=4&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$15 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11025?t=5&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5)
---
| | [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11001?t=6&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5)
---
| [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11002?t=7&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5)
---
| | [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11003?t=8&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5)
---
| [$250 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11026?t=9&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10998?t=10&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5)
---
Since leaving the Department of Justice, Attorney General Holder has focused all his energy on ending gerrymandering and creating more representative maps, fixing those that have given Republicans a disproportionate amount of power (basically ensuring that states would have permanent Republican majorities).
So, like me, he knows the power states have to influence the rest of the country -- in good ways and, too often, bad. There's so much we can do at the state level that makes the rest of the country stronger -- including embracing universal vote-by-mail! -- and I'm excited to talk more with him about that.
**[I hope you can join us: Donate $15 or whatever you can, and you can join former Attorney General Eric Holder and I on Zoom next Thursday.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10998?t=11&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10998?t=12&akid=8143%2E868730%2E7BrCj5)

clean_body: We'll talk civil rights, voting rights, and state leadership. | Friend, With vote-by-mail, we've tried to make voting as easy as possible in Washington state because we know that when all of us can vote more easily and more securely, our democracy is better for it. And I know just the person to talk to about the subject: former Attorney General Eric Holder. He's spent his career fighting to expand voting rights, especially in areas that are historically marginalized. We've seen what happens when we take our eye off the ball: Voters are being purged from the rolls in Georgia and Wisconsin, and Texas has instituted strict voter ID laws. I'm excited to talk to Attorney General Holder about all this and more next Thursday, September 10, at 5:30 p.m. PT / 8:30 p.m. ET. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Since leaving the Department of Justice, Attorney General Holder has focused all his energy on ending gerrymandering and creating more representative maps, fixing those that have given Republicans a disproportionate amount of power (basically ensuring that states would have permanent Republican majorities). So, like me, he knows the power states have to influence the rest of the country -- in good ways and, too often, bad. There's so much we can do at the state level that makes the rest of the country stronger -- including embracing universal vote-by-mail! -- and I'm excited to talk more with him about that. Very truly yours, Jay

subject: Don’t miss out on hearing from our special guest!

body:
Senator Cory Booker will be kicking off our next virtual phone bank with Beto next Tuesday as we connect with voters across Texas.
#
Friend,
Did you see Senator Cory Booker is kicking off our next phone bank? Whether you’re one of our regular phone bankers or you haven’t been on a dialer before, Sen. Booker’s legendary pep talks will get you ready to make calls to voters across Texas!
Upcoming events:
---
[Virtual Phone Bank with Beto, featuring special guest Sen. Cory Booker](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43035?source=ema20200904-103887&t=1&akid=103887%2E444211%2ET_PV0-)[

Kate Roberts

subject: our safety is at risk →

body:
Republicans are spending millions of dollars on paid canvassers in the middle of a pandemic
Friend,
In case you haven’t seen my team’s rapid response memo, **a Republican super PAC is spending millions of dollars to send paid canvassers to our doors in the middle of a pandemic.**

This blatant disregard for our health must be called out for what it is: **a desperate attempt to prop up our extremist opponent, Troy Nehls.** His message is losing to our message of championing public health initiatives, expanding health care access, and rebuilding our economy so it works for the families of our district -- **and the special interests pouring millions of dollars into this race know it.**

While our opponent disregarded the seriousness of this pandemic, even as his own employees got sick, my campaign continued to champion expanding health care access and went remote to practice public safety -- **and our grassroots team built a community for resource-sharing so our families could get through this crisis together.**
_**That’s the kind of leadership I pledge to bring to Congress -- and that’s why I’m asking for your support.**_
Take a look at the memo my team sent out yesterday and chip in to our campaign using this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/sriq32020**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19011903/246481686/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.04_b1_smrr3_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2U1ZmY1MS1lZGVlLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mUtmb1XzcUXowL5ak6aOCEsVlX6--2Mgd0HZkkapUKc=)

clean_body: Republicans are spending millions of dollars on paid canvassers in the middle of a pandemic Friend, In case you haven’t seen my team’s rapid response memo, a Republican super PAC is spending millions of dollars to send paid canvassers to our doors in the middle of a pandemic. This blatant disregard for our health must be called out for what it is: a desperate attempt to prop up our extremist opponent, Troy Nehls. His message is losing to our message of championing public health initiatives, expanding health care access, and rebuilding our economy so it works for the families of our district -- and the special interests pouring millions of dollars into this race know it. While our opponent disregarded the seriousness of this pandemic, even as his own employees got sick, my campaign continued to champion expanding health care access and went remote to practice public safety -- and our grassroots team built a community for resource-sharing so our families could get through this crisis together. That’s the kind of leadership I pledge to bring to Congress -- and that’s why I’m asking for your support. Take a look at the memo my team sent out yesterday and chip in to our campaign using this link: = Thanks, Sri \-----------Forwarded Message---------- Date: 9/3/2020 From: Rapid Response Team, Sri 2020 Subject: Memo for you = | | Friend,this is urgent:A Republican super PAC is spending millions of dollars to send paid canvassers to your door in the middle of a pandemic. Clearly, it means that our opponents are willing to do anything to win -- even if it means ignoring our health experts and sending people door-to-door, potentially putting you and your loved ones at risk. We need a leader whose campaign reflects the way they’ll lead in Congress. Our district demands someone who will listen to health experts, build a grassroots network and organize our community to help people through this difficult time, and fight for policies like expanding health care access and rebuilding our economy to work for our families, not special interests. body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20248-9e5e3a5760a149f6bffaec67c9af1403/76/53/889278fa-97b9-4dab-9d8d-998b47d1c237)** Coronavirus restrictions for thee, but not for me — that’s the rule Nancy Pelosi apparently follows in her home district of San Francisco. Earlier this week, Speaker of the House Pelosi was caught using the power of her office to circumvent local coronavirus restrictions. Pelosi reportedly asked a shuttered San Francisco hair-salon for a wash and blow-out, despite local coronavirus restrictions saying the salon had to remain closed. Not only did Pelosi ignore local coronavirus restrictions, she was also seen not wearing a mask in the video that surfaced. After months of supporting needless coronavirus restrictions and ridiculing those who refused to wear masks, Pelosi was caught blatantly ignoring two things she has vocally supported and defended. [_The Patriot Project_ has the full story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ4LTllNWUzYTU3NjBhMTQ5ZjZiZmZhZWM2N2M5YWYxNDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL3NhbG9uLW93bmVyLXJlc3BvbmRzLWFmdGVyLXBlbG9zaS1hbGxlZ2VzLXNoZS13YXMtdmljdGltLW9mLXNldHVwLWFic29sdXRlbHktZmFsc2UvP21pZD00MjYxOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=_VZVWOZY6IsJJuLLZgHdXg) [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ4LTllNWUzYTU3NjBhMTQ5ZjZiZmZhZWM2N2M5YWYxNDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL3NhbG9uLW93bmVyLXJlc3BvbmRzLWFmdGVyLXBlbG9zaS1hbGxlZ2VzLXNoZS13YXMtdmljdGltLW9mLXNldHVwLWFic29sdXRlbHktZmFsc2UvP21pZD00MjYxOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=VEJ-A-ok_KOkkcwZbLk81A) **[Wire Salon Owner Responds After Pelosi Alleges She Was Victim of ‘Setup’: ‘Absolutely False’](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ4LTllNWUzYTU3NjBhMTQ5ZjZiZmZhZWM2N2M5YWYxNDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL3NhbG9uLW93bmVyLXJlc3BvbmRzLWFmdGVyLXBlbG9zaS1hbGxlZ2VzLXNoZS13YXMtdmljdGltLW9mLXNldHVwLWFic29sdXRlbHktZmFsc2UvP21pZD00MjYxOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=BqnEjtu4m6azBQcZJ-ujcA)**

Earlier this week, Judicial Watch unveiled a massive scandal, which has (not shockingly) gone mostly unaddressed by the mainstream media.

New records, obtained by Judicial Watch from the State Department through a Freedom of Information Act request, confirmed that the Ukranian Embassy, under the leadership of former Ambassador Marie Yovanovitch, monitored, in potential violation of the law, the social media accounts of conservative journalists, pundits, television personalities, and even the President's son.

13 individuals were surveilled in total, including:
* Donald Trump Jr.
* Laura Ingraham
* Sean Hannity
* Lou Dobbs
* Dan Bongino
* Sara Carter
* Jack Posobiec
* John Solomon
* Ryan Saavedra
* Sebastion Gorka
* Rudy Giuliani
* Pamela Geller
* Michael McFaul

The report also elaborates on what search terms were to be flagged, including:
* Yovanovitch
* Ukraine Ambassador
* Ukrainian Ambassador
* Ukraine Soros
* Clinton Campaign
* Biden-Burisma

This is obvious corruption that needs to be addressed immediately. Certainly, this warrants an investigation, right?

If you haven’t heard yet, America has a dangerous shortage of poll workers this year. We know that election integrity is one of the most important parts of a functioning republic. Unfortunately, the age group that is most vulnerable to COVID is also the group of people that usually make up the bulk of poll workers.

We also know that the left, more than anything, wants universal mail-in voting, no protections against voter fraud, and more. They want any excuse to corrupt our elections, and so, it is up to patriots like you to step up and serve as poll workers, if you are someone who is low-risk and can show up in person.

[We’ve created a very short how-to guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ4LTllNWUzYTU3NjBhMTQ5ZjZiZmZhZWM2N2M5YWYxNDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2MTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=npmn6dkd8fPUlsx6nAHwDA) about how to become a poll worker. It will answer questions you may have about what a poll worker does, how to get the process started, and where to sign up.

You can also go straight to [www.eac.gov/help-america-vote](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ4LTllNWUzYTU3NjBhMTQ5ZjZiZmZhZWM2N2M5YWYxNDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5lYWMuZ292L2hlbHAtYW1lcmljYS12b3RlP21pZD00MjYxOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Xiycc898xtcYAZUzkk0E1A) and input your state and county information to sign up.

**And, please don’t wait to sign up! There are deadlines that must be met, and if you delay, you might miss your chance.**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Two graphs
body:
Today I want to share with you two graphs that tell us a lot about wh...
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Today I want to share with you two graphs that tell us a lot about where we've been, where we are, and what we need to do to keep ourselves and our loved ones safe.
The first graph is today's COVID-19 data released by the Department of Health. As you can see, we administered 8,870 tests, we were able to maintain a 0.7% positivity rate, and thankfully, we had no new deaths. This data shows that Rhode Islanders are working hard to keep COVID-19 contained, and it's working. Thank you. I know we have all had to cancel events and gatherings we were looking forward to, but it's saving lives.
It's critical that we keep working hard to stop the spread of COVID-19 - especially this Labor Day weekend.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b5HiqwGDEnVBgrOHj6s0H5smC8-SDRQEg_WXYIfU8209LIsBkpFqfXJ2y1JZzIFLghERYiabQt1bTGOhGuB_2-KzBnE7As9xMjr3xmKX0aFzMibzwF5raMJNZXhlUmiFagE4wHPLxwgiWePYGUw81drJUJjEiJeJLVdLAhuaBSPo7-yI6wY7yOZqrL6SRMnYy7uzOeroqDo=&c=9Kfi57q4OWN0lKZPANqCE27emaN_XZz25dBAv4PbBn5P0Lujpd-YJw==&ch=tLr7pA7Kff_2M4mpdpMQpBp8EgNtB788Ztgj2o4XoFJJud8IOhhaag==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b5HiqwGDEnVBgrOHj6s0H5smC8-SDRQEg_WXYIfU8209LIsBkpFqfXJ2y1JZzIFLghERYiabQt1bTGOhGuB_2-KzBnE7As9xMjr3xmKX0aFzMibzwF5raMJNZXhlUmiFagE4wHPLxwgiWePYGUw81drJUJjEiJeJLVdLAhuaBSPo7-yI6wY7yOZqrL6SRMnYy7uzOeroqDo=&c=9Kfi57q4OWN0lKZPANqCE27emaN_XZz25dBAv4PbBn5P0Lujpd-YJw==&ch=tLr7pA7Kff_2M4mpdpMQpBp8EgNtB788Ztgj2o4XoFJJud8IOhhaag==).
---
| The second graph I want to show you today illustrates what happened after the Fourth of July. Before that, we had days with new cases in the twenties and thirties, and even as low as the teens. It took a lot of time, hard work and sacrifice to get there from our peak at the end of April, when we had days with more than 400 new cases. But then, soon after the Fourth of July, we saw a spike in cases because people did not follow the rules. People got together in big groups. They had big parties and barbecues. They weren't wearing their masks and they weren't practicing social distancing. That's not guesswork - we did extensive interviewing with people who tested positive to learn about where they contracted the virus. We know for a fact that because of that behavior, our daily case numbers jumped into the triple digits.
---
|
---
| It's important to remember that COVID-19 can turn on a dime. The minute we start to go back up the curve, cases can spread exponentially, and the only way to bring it back down is to tighten restrictions. On this slide you see a clear inflection point on the Fourth of July. But you also see a second inflection point a few weeks ago, when new hospitalizations started ticking down again. This timing also has a clear correlation - this time to our lowering of the social gathering limit to 15 and early closures of bars. COVID-19 does not care what day it is. It will not take the day off on Labor Day, even if you really, really want it to. It is still not safe to gather in large groups over the long weekend, and doing so puts your health, the economy, and the lives of your fellow Rhode Islanders at risk.
Now is not the time to let our guard down. We cannot let Labor Day become another inflection point on this graph. If we wear masks and keep our gatherings small, outdoors, and socially distanced, we can continue on our current trajectory. But if we don't follow the rules this weekend, if we let up like we did on the Fourth of July, we will see it in the data over the next few weeks, right as kids are getting back to school. Please, be responsible this weekend.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor

This data shows that Rhode Islanders are working hard to keep COVID-19 contained, and it's working. Thank you. I know we have all had to cancel events and gatherings we were looking forward to, but it's saving lives. It's critical that we keep working hard to stop the spread of COVID-19 - especially this Labor Day weekend. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | The second graph I want to show you today illustrates what happened after the Fourth of July. Before that, we had days with new cases in the twenties and thirties, and even as low as the teens. It took a lot of time, hard work and sacrifice to get there from our peak at the end of April, when we had days with more than 400 new cases. But then, soon after the Fourth of July, we saw a spike in cases because people did not follow the rules. People got together in big groups. They had big parties and barbecues. They weren't wearing their masks and they weren't practicing social distancing. That's not guesswork - we did extensive interviewing with people who tested positive to learn about where they contracted the virus. We know for a fact that because of that behavior, our daily case numbers jumped into the triple digits. | | It's important to remember that COVID-19 can turn on a dime. The minute we start to go back up the curve, cases can spread exponentially, and the only way to bring it back down is to tighten restrictions. On this slide you see a clear inflection point on the Fourth of July. But you also see a second inflection point a few weeks ago, when new hospitalizations started ticking down again. This timing also has a clear correlation - this time to our lowering of the social gathering limit to 15 and early closures of bars. COVID-19 does not care what day it is. It will not take the day off on Labor Day, even if you really, really want it to. It is still not safe to gather in large groups over the long weekend, and doing so puts your health, the economy, and the lives of your fellow Rhode Islanders at risk. Now is not the time to let our guard down. We cannot let Labor Day become another inflection point on this graph. If we wear masks and keep our gatherings small, outdoors, and socially distanced, we can continue on our current trajectory. But if we don't follow the rules this weekend, if we let up like we did on the Fourth of July, we will see it in the data over the next few weeks, right as kids are getting back to school. Please, be responsible this weekend. We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

subject: bridges, not walls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We believe that we are better together than alone. I am worried that we've lost sight of that belief in America. |

Dear Peter,

I've lived my life at the borders. Between cultures. Between disciplines. Between musics. Between generations.

And throughout my life I've learned that in culture, we build bridges, not walls. We believe that we are better together than alone. I am worried that we've lost sight of that belief in America.

Peter, we need a president who builds bridges, not walls. That's why I'm personally asking if you can join me in donating to the Biden-Harris campaign today.

**Joe says it best: we are in a battle for the soul of the nation. It 's a battle to uphold and honor the values that we hold dear, values like empathy, and dignity, and respect for truth. These are our values, and they are Joe's values. And they are the values we need for a better future.**

[This election is too important to sit out.
