name: Lisa Scheller
subject: POLICE FOR SCHELLER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
**LISA SCHELLER RELEASES FIFTH COALITION TODAY “POLICE FOR SCHELLER”** **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Brooke Race Info@schellerforcongress.com **Allentown, Pa.** – Today, the Scheller Campaign is proud to announce its fifth coalition, Police for Scheller. Lisa Scheller strongly stands with our men and women in blue. The police are the first responders to a broad range of public-safety issues and serious crime. Chairman, Patrick Cubbage, served in the US Army and has over 30 years experience in law enforcement. Patrick released the following statement: “Lisa is willing to stand up and fight for PA07. She is a patriot, not a socialist. I was motivated to support her when I first heard her speak at her congressional candidate announcement. She proved that by fighting for the people in Lehigh County to lower their taxes. Lisa will bring that same energy to fight for everyone in the 7th Congressional District, especially law enforcement. She supports Law and Order and will defend the police, not defund them. She is willing to give up her salary in support of veterans and other charities that will benefit the Lehigh Valley. She is the candidate we need.” [JOIN POLICE FOR SCHELLER NOW](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=1b210e02b7b6479bb3c59ef479e0e2c7&_e=1nQ0nNg8AGR12mVfh3cr5E2iNiSV0w8bYGKN4kfCJZ1Kv3k5husCyM9dxMiA7bQo8wjz2tyomUZeYt04pfTs3PDV1eppovDK8nppx0R3oQl8BF5utP8WDlGdL-AFAvFdg_J6i14su__5bRJ3nFDoKPR2lPvD4isfMIGHlTIQ2mYhZ6cXXeBMCJOlZ_KD-D-lC2ZB-Ig3JgfZP-K5saxXc1mG0hVAFvL0A0XohOVJ3gZFzsKOtwufcA6caxEdkVGKrYJAuTTH48ssiw3xQwJ46hxgimZZQE0c4F9Y52AtP7g%3D) Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. [Unsubscribe](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=1b210e02b7b6479bb3c59ef479e0e2c7&_t=vIBN-mO88hyQjFZhWWMrolDrxPUqkxwcUwKqLDgk9_f7ue6Plk0x6qBFZ-nM862apAK3ZCO4wJxv_2mqKGILFnY34D5EB0FetnphaESWja9OkxairIu54a1kcplr5EUI0UZpKzXawx6drrDNEz5sxLrKIa1i5kSBAsKMu34ox3o%3D)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Let’s level the playing field for working people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
When we have more people in office for whom policy is personal, we get better policy outcomes. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZDimgxxVF0nm-X6HNh6eC1sVDZLU9PqyJtLnM7VtpbvIV13F-QS8iVuj-xYJ9DFsCAGXlL-RRgUlh7f_l5swtdLP7zs5TGE7KAMlX8eVTEKrq8GOPSg0WLarxcTNuurMahGHzFP0fXP3P31j4mW98SYV3kgoxrkXFTPz8E_BiZEHkX2qNfS1ZpEHKqh1j5J1FSK50bxrR3-6zTfhbOJ-5Ub7Ky-RCHJ_zx2CIiW9hiG_4dXbpqeixRFNjDAZVEqX73Qb5zrY4vce4RDrkb8dV4jq5RBqS34JDdwxXULYDrzzvQ69Wrsp_WIwd5p7uH0MlDiWA8TfHka9mdvrF_EKz/34w/svTUfsmdRtu6JLf_1ysPVw/h0/7BA4qmMMK8qckkRNKkVHDfapuplE5ICbzKQQBIiGcl0) Friends, It’s important that people who’ve grown up poor or working-class be elected to public office, because when we have more people in office for whom policy is personal, we get better policy outcomes. **In Congress, I will draw upon my own life experiences as well as the concerns of my constituents to advocate for working people.** **[Please make a contribution to my campaign today to help me win this election and lead this fight to bring opportunity to all Americans, not just the wealthy.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZDimgxxVF0nm-X6HNh6eC1sVDZLU9PqyJtLnM7VtpbvIV13F-QS8iVuj-xYJ9DFvNt77VkQ8ByuvliD-CqtJTEMNRIaQUPAlumlBsZGgHrXe9bCU3XWrMSX85Zfsinhc3GmhnpF6fks-rOmLDSSBzTooDpw_Tmp33l6KiM7JOUIp4Uml5OZRTgb47N4hJEC1Zaz5RBY3-9Zpd1fCNJ-QlXIcrS4bb5ijC-gSzxXU6XgSCzM_bU2Zer1gkimdr8-ndjHDBvmAteuMafzPM1fGKeyTQKmMBZQ4nIqHwEnkWAMu8RHDZasPWOYdz0P6a1CujJamwQxpzfr75YB004uXU/34w/svTUfsmdRtu6JLf_1ysPVw/h1/KOgZLN9iJpogvAoRub_ToNrdJwhRW4diw1lVTNlfDjg)** We need members of Congress who have lived in public housing, not just paid a visit to it during a campaign stop. We need members of Congress who have been on food stamps or have gone without having health insurance. These are not just platitudes to me; these are lived experiences. Throughout most of American history, our government has been run almost entirely by rich, white, straight, cisgender men. At worst, they’ve treated the lives of Black folks and LGBTQ+ folks as a political football. At best, they simply can’t empathize with folks like me. **One of the best ways we can level the playing field for working people, the Black community, the LGBTQ+ community, and all of our underserved communities is to send more of them to Congress.** **[If you agree, please make a contribution to my campaign today. As someone who is Black, gay, and grew up in public housing, I’ll bring a perspective to Congress that’s sorely needed — but I can’t get there without your help.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZDimgxxVF0nm-X6HNh6eC1sVDZLU9PqyJtLnM7VtpbvIV13F-QS8iVuj-xYJ9DFuPSVfCVuOxAW0QkqswPWEWYQvM_8Ju3FrkQ81LZNy_ciV9RokizYRuiCyBJD8E0BzdyPq_WAQHbbW3kLTknmgK2lPHjtqrt-mRzY88IdU-wVCFvhtKYIliijQFtbHtLAtK3NXcRDxdEe6tuu118v6sfdbm4YKPxP0gMfyZmvzPVX0A9f0_euRm8SAS77N10ZySKjbFgVt84pq1IYqi8X_d8s3r10EO8ErxmYWXJkdkb8yoc49k_s-iiVr5Jbh4ySwcfJhbl3eYhs_LELWzWytm/34w/svTUfsmdRtu6JLf_1ysPVw/h2/lkAvgarSstn60wpYSQUK23eXgq2-Aki3HAL5XuHbGKU)** Thank you for your support, Mondaire
[DONATE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZDimgxxVF0nm-X6HNh6eC1sVDZLU9PqyJtLnM7VtpbvIV13F-QS8iVuj-xYJ9DFvC_4qWMXZz4WHcpOUgR40XRmsqJ8fa238Tm1GeLoMT-nKzT5WNpYqHpC98DsBkxK3bcr9ESickr2x5__ug_hcEycfT5sppRauyt9qL4zYkVpaz36-UFqEkyy96dlsLhCXjQIZG8TvPq8AtrFRhk4tbV9D_1P1dHhZy6OyhbwfxKCB5zeUCGFnEWbqseQ0C8IODc9jYM2uiHnwQkEeXDLngTHODL9mg6A2qtzpNTB7T6V3tfh5xYCGo01bkovAp-ews30doVUH2geswLW-rnXIe/34w/svTUfsmdRtu6JLf_1ysPVw/h3/JJSEUPI59sHh7zZC8IukkwrcNZa8jl-a-wxTB6h8f_w)

clean_body: When we have more people in office for whom policy is personal, we get better policy outcomes. | | | Friends, It’s important that people who’ve grown up poor or working-class be elected to public office, because when we have more people in office for whom policy is personal, we get better policy outcomes. In Congress, I will draw upon my own life experiences as well as the concerns of my constituents to advocate for working people. We need members of Congress who have lived in public housing, not just paid a visit to it during a campaign stop. We need members of Congress who have been on food stamps or have gone without having health insurance. These are not just platitudes to me; these are lived experiences. Throughout most of American history, our government has been run almost entirely by rich, white, straight, cisgender men. At worst, they’ve treated the lives of Black folks and LGBTQ+ folks as a political football. At best, they simply can’t empathize with folks like me. One of the best ways we can level the playing field for working people, the Black community, the LGBTQ+ community, and all of our underserved communities is to send more of them to Congress. Thank you for your support, Mondaire Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

Hey team,

It's Ellen, Jon Ossoff's Campaign Manager here in Georgia.

Here's the deal, friend: With less than two months to go before Election Day, **Jon Ossoff is neck and neck with Donald Trump's "favorite Senator," David Perdue.**

Jon is surging, but he's going to need a little more momentum to be sure we can defeat Perdue in November.

Plus, with so many folks voting early and by mail this year because of the pandemic, we need to make sure we reach every single voter in Georgia **well before November 3.**

_We need to keep this momentum going strong all the way through November, and we need your help, friend._

**[So I'm asking: Can you chip in $20 right now to help us in our efforts?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2a75/5b2c1286/389f2659/25f0ff55/2734558592/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_04_state_ra?refcode=em_2020_09_04_state_ra&amount=20")**

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update - Sep. 4
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=161A414A20A1631)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK
---
| | The best way to ensure free, fair, and accessible elections is more citizen engagement at the polls and in the democratic process. That's why True the Vote teamed up with the U.S. Election Assistance Commission this week on [National Poll Worker Recruitment Day](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=161A414A20A1632) to raise awareness about the benefits and importance of poll working and inspire more Americans to volunteer in the November election.
Now is the time to sign up and get involved. America is facing a critical shortage of these dedicated volunteers during the early voting period and on Election Day. Recruiting poll workers is often a challenge for many election officials across the country and the COVID-19 pandemic has made this need even more critical. Despite many states changing the election process to an unsecure vote-by-mail option, millions of Americans – especially voters with disabilities, elderly, and those who lack reliable mail service – will continue to rely on in-person voting to cast a ballot. If you are able and willing to serve, please [sign up today to work the polls](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=161A414A20A1633) and help ensure a free and fair election this November.
Onward! Catherine Engelbrecht
---
| |
---
|

|
---
| | IN THE NEWS
---
| | | |
---
| | TOWNHALL.COM: **VOTING IS NOT GOING TO BE ENOUGH THIS YEAR**
"Catherine Engelbrecht has seen a lot of voter and election fraud in her days, from false registrations to illegal 'assistance' at the polls... But the threat to the 2020 election 'is more significant than anything I've ever seen,' she told Townhall."

---
| | [ READ MORE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=161A414A20A1641)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | AG WILLIAM BARR TELLS THE TRUTH ABOUT UNIVERSAL MAIL-IN VOTING
In a heated interview with CNN's Wolf Blitzer this week, Attorney General William Barr said universal mail-in voting: "is playing with fire...very open to fraud and coercion."
---
| | [ READ MORE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=161A414A20A1642)
---
| | |
---
| | **TRUE THE VOTE'S COMMENT ON MONTANA'S ALL-MAIL ELECTION**
True the Vote Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht released a statement commending the lawsuit against Montana Governor Steve Bullock’s action to conduct an entirely vote by mail election in the state.
---
| | [ READ MORE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=161A414A20A1643)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | TX SUPREME COURT HALTS HARRIS COUNTY MAIL-IN BALLOTS
TX AG, Ken Paxton warned Harris County Clerk Chris Hollins to stop its mail-in ballot scheme or face legal action. The AGE has suggested for months that encouraging mail-in ballots could result in prosecution.

---
| | [ READ MORE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=161A414A20A1644)

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Peter, can you help us break more records?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Hopefully you've seen the news by now: |
---
Peter, hopefully you've seen the news by now:

**Last month, together, we raised a historic $364.5 million to elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot.**

We made history thanks to grassroots supporters like you -- and the more than 1.5 million people who made their first donation last month. And we brought in $205 million from online donors -- the most any campaign has raised online _ever_ in one month -- with a whole lot of it coming from people chipping in to emails like this one. We're so proud of, and so grateful for, what we've achieved together as a grassroots campaign.

So Peter, we have a challenge on our hands: we made history in August, but September is an even more important month to persuade voters and turn out our supporters.

**Can you help us keep the momentum up and keep breaking records?**

[Anything you're able to chip in today will help make sure our September is even better than our incredible August. Will you chip in $25 or whatever makes sense for your budget?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.04_B2_keepuppace_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.04_B2_keepuppace_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | **Supporter Record for[Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.04_B2_keepuppace_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.04_B2_keepuppace_X__F1_S2_C1__full")**

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1d6/1cd0ac28/159f9b828/35701c6d/1780175001/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1d6/1cd0ac28/159f9b828/35701c6c/1780175001/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1d6/1cd0ac28/159f9b828/35701c6f/1780175001/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1d6/1cd0ac28/159f9b828/35701c6a/1780175001/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Let's send these four leaders to Washington. Let's get them in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Today, I want to focus on four House races where we can flip Republican-held seats. I've endorsed Democratic candidates Pat Timmons-Goodson (North Carolina 8th), Sima Ladjevardian (Texas 2nd), Qasim R | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c54c/3087043505/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
If we don't hold onto our Democratic House majority this November, it's going to be impossible to get big things done for the American people next year -- even if we win the White House and Senate.

Republicans will just keep saying their favorite word, over and over again: "No." No to providing relief for working people, no to ensuring equal justice under the law, no to rooting out corruption, no to ending the climate crisis, no to expanding Social Security, no to expanding health care.

So right now, we've got to do everything we can to protect our House majority -- and to expand it. **Today, I want to focus on four House races where we can flip Republican-held seats.**

I've endorsed Democratic candidates Pat Timmons-Goodson (North Carolina 8th), Sima Ladjevardian (Texas 2nd), Qasim Rashid (Virginia 1st), and Christina Finello (Pennsylvania 1st) because they are leaders who will puts people first -- and they know how to win.

**[So, if you're able to make a donation right now, I'm asking you to chip in to help elect Pat Timmons-Goodson, Sima Ladjevardian, Qasim Rashid, Christina Finello, and Warren Democrats across the country. $2 or whatever you can contribute would make a real difference in these critical races that could come down to the wire.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c54f/3087043505/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXB0Zy1zbC1xci1jZiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1WMDJGX0VHUl9FTkRfRV8yMDIwMDkwNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ptg-sl-qr-cf?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV02F_EGR_END_E_20200904_V1S1_P")**

All four of these Democrats will lift up the voices of working people.

**Justice Pat Timmons-Goodson** knows what service to the people looks like. With her career as a jurist and as a commissioner serving on the U.S. Commission on Civil Rights, Pat has the judgment and experience to fight for justice, equality, and fairness for every American -- starting on day one. She will be a strong fighter for the people of North Carolina's Eighth District -- and for families across the country.

As a lawyer, small business owner, and breast cancer survivor, **Sima Ladjevardian** understands that no one should have to choose between refilling life-saving medication and feeding their family. Unlike her opponent, Sima will fight to make health care more affordable, take on the corporate drug lobby to lower prescription drug costs, and protect Texans with pre-existing conditions.

**Qasim Rashid** has dedicated his entire career to the fight for social, racial, and economic justice. From supporting survivors of domestic and sexual violence, to uplifting people who are incarcerated through prison chaplaincy, and serving children from vulnerable communities, Qasim has demonstrated the leadership and compassion the people of Virginia's First District deserve.

**Christina Finello** is a mom, mental health and veterans' advocate, and fifth-generation Pennsylvanian who grew up in a working-class union family. She'll be a steadfast fighter for working families because she knows the challenges they face each day. She'll fight to ensure affordable health care and to rebuild our economy so it works for everyone -- and she'll make history as this district's first congresswoman.

**Let's send these four leaders to Washington. Let's get them in the fight. Let's make sure they have all the resources they need to get out the vote in these final weeks before the most important election of our lifetimes.**

[If you can, please split a donation between their House campaigns and Warren Democrats so we can expand our House majority and elect champions for working people up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c54f/3087043505/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXB0Zy1zbC1xci1jZiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1WMDJGX0VHUl9FTkRfRV8yMDIwMDkwNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ptg-sl-qr-cf?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV02F_EGR_END_E_20200904_V1S1_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c54f/3087043505/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXB0Zy1zbC1xci1jZiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1WMDJGX0VHUl9FTkRfRV8yMDIwMDkwNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ptg-sl-qr-cf?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV02F_EGR_END_E_20200904_V1S1_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c5a2/3087043505/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c5a5/3087043505/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c5a4/3087043505/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c5a7/3087043505/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c5a6/3087043505/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525189/45c30650/1c31401d0/66e8c5a9/3087043505/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Bill Olson
subject: Don't mess with Central Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iSlGe8CezF6OuRU&b=mrN8_nNJz8VCJlODfAQNOA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I live in Central Florida, not far from Orlando. We are a law and order suburban community, a swing district! I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left extremist Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iSlGe8CezF6OuRU&b=mrN8_nNJz8VCJlODfAQNOA

The Biden Riots may have roots in hole-in-the-ground communities like Portland or Seattle, but we here in Central Florida don't take well to that stuff here!

What happened in Kenosha, Wisconsin is the best example of why we NEED the Second Amendment, and why we must fight this year to protect it.

The story of Kyle Rittenhouse, a young man who works in Kenosha, breaks my heart. He was being violently attacked and he used the Second Amendment to defend himself.

The liberals defended the murderous rioters and villified this kid. They attacked him because he did not allow a crazed, violent mob to kill him.

The riots started in my district too. But law enforcement here was having none of it, and we put these idiots down!

Check out the words of Polk County Sheriff Judd, in referring to the unrest in my district:

“The reason [for Monday’s continued curfew] is clear – we’ve had criminal conduct afoot," Sheriff Judd said. "We’ve had citizens injured, windows broken, and we’ve had other attempts at assaulting law enforcement officers and assaulting buildings that we repelled. And there are curfews in other communities, and we certainly don’t want to create a vacuum for people to come here when there’s a curfew in another area.”

He went on to say that if you needed to be out during the curfew because of work or another emergency, the "curfew's not for you." Instead, "it's for the lawless people that would wreak havoc in the community."

Sheriff Judd also had a stern message for anyone who might come to the county to riot, loot, or injure people.

"I would tell them if you value your life, you probably shouldn’t do that in Polk County, because the people of Polk County like guns, they have guns, and I encourage them to own guns, and they’re going to be in their homes tonight with their guns loaded. And if you try to break into their homes, to steal, to set fires, I’m highly recommending they blow you back out of their house with their guns. So leave the community alone, and we’ll do our best to support the community."

Sheriff Judd speaks for all of us. If you come to Central Florida to destroy our communities and kill our people, we will not treat you with kid gloves like Seattle or Portland's weak mayors. We will use our Second Amendment rights, just like Kyle Rittenhouse did!

The extremist Dems and the Fake News will call us all kind of names. If they were willing to destroy the lives of two minor children- Kyle Rittenhouse and Nick Sandmann- they will certainly try to smear us.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iSlGe8CezF6OuRU&b=mrN8_nNJz8VCJlODfAQNOA

The extreme Left actively hates us. If they gain power this year, kiss good bye to your gun rights! They hate our Second Amendment and they want to slime this kid because of it.

Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President!

It's the extremists or us. That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iSlGe8CezF6OuRU&b=mrN8_nNJz8VCJlODfAQNOA

I won't be afraid to fight. I'll fight the extremists and I'll fight for our liberties.

Last week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". She wants the rioters to attack us and harm our families. The Democrats may enjoy playing games with our families and their safety, but I don't!

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies!

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Antifa!

today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

body:

**This Week in Democracy:**

---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=752a8c42ac&e=0aad15100c)
---

Today marks 60 days until Election Day - are you ready to cast your vote? COVID means that it's more confusing than ever to cast your ballot this year: [check out our latest blog post](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=60af31f88c&e=0aad15100c) for 7 key voting terms that you should know before November.

| [Learn More](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=0938fe40ed&e=0aad15100c "Learn More")

_9.02.20 | Bloomberg_ States are scrambling to find Election Day poll workers.

name: Team Carney
subject: Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/txtBE9oTFNXCYkbKfSJElQ==?midqs=aWbBLuIEEhgbB6aMHGWdcA==)
## [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/HxVeyXqCMDN3_YgNLv2RQQ==)
---
## FROM THE TEAM
This Labor Day weekend, we'd like to say thank you to all of the men and women who make our communities strong. We hope you all have a safe and relaxing weekend.

Next week, our campaign kicks into high gear and we need your help to build momentum toward election day. Please consider [**getting a yard sign**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/pkE6QbvgBDeL7Cq7w6fZ-A==), **[signing up to volunteer](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/XHfv2WQ-gNnL8OqZ1mwtAw==)** , or **[chipping in what you can](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/HxVeyXqCMDN3_YgNLv2RQQ==)**. We're excited to see more of our Team Carney friends in the coming days!

**Reminder:** The Democratic Primary Election Day is right around the corner. Cast your mail-in ballot as soon as possible, or vote in-person on **September 15**. For more information on **[secure ballot drop box locations](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/VWAvbYqvFWK6eZzbwkXU8A==)** and polling places, visit: **[ivote.de.gov](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/tnPljjoiHz4QWw3ldtKf3Q==)**.

Have a wonderful holiday weekend - and we look forward to getting to work with you all next week!

Stay Safe,
Team Carney

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/XHfv2WQ-gNnL8OqZ1mwtAw==?midqs=aWbBLuIEEhgbB6aMHGWdcA==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/HxVeyXqCMDN3_YgNLv2RQQ==?midqs=aWbBLuIEEhgbB6aMHGWdcA==)

FOLLOW & SHARE ON SOCIAL: **@johncarneyde**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/Klfxq4kJwTz-4cxOtXCalA==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/qQ4E84TRZLy6f9ILcB2uEw==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YE8TYNvhcQBrDKHIF8L0Sw==/V2CTXNzyFZi-edmfQ2vQPQ==)

subject: BLM protesters shut down Tom Cotton?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
If Joe Biden wins in November, no one will be safe from the radical mob. The liberal mob wants to scare you into silence. That is how they will win, if freedom-loving patriots like you just give up and take the knee. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzODIwNzYS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDQwODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

The radical left is out of control.

They are rioting in our streets, attacking police, setting fire to buildings and trying to silence anyone who disagrees with them.

I am tired of the media giving the far left a free pass. And what’s worse is that Joe Biden's campaign and Kamala Harris helped violent rioters pay bail and get out of jail.

Instead of just complaining, I decided to go on offense and launched a hard-hitting ad in swing states calling out Joe Biden and the radical left.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzODIwNzYS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDQwODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0
My ad must have struck a nerve because at a recent campaign event with Senator Kelly Loeffler, angry BLM protesters tried to shut me down.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzODIwNzYS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDQwODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0
I didn’t back down. I stood up to the mob.

Peter, let’s be real: what I went through wasn’t a big deal. I can handle it. But what we’re seeing across the country IS a big deal. And now is not the time to back down. We need to make sure every voter knows the truth about the mob before the election.
Donate Now to Take on the Liberal Mob http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzODIwNzYS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDQwODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0
The fact is that if Joe Biden wins in November, no one will be safe from the liberal mob.

The liberal mob wants to scare you into silence. That is how they will win--if freedom-loving patriots like you just give up and take the knee.

When the dust settles from this election in November, will you regret not doing everything you could to stop the radical left? I'm all in, and I'm asking for your help so I can keep running my ad across the country to expose the liberal mob. In service, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzODIwNzYS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDQwODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0 Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzODIwNzYS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDQwODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0

P.S. Be sure to check out my new ad that has caused the meltdown from the radical left. Click HERE. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzODIwNzYS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDQwODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Revving up again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
As we head into Labor Day weekend, we're now officially 60 days away from Election Day. And just as campaigns across our state are revving up... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/revving-up-again?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Revving Up Again**_
As we head into Labor Day weekend, we're now officially 60 days away from Election Day. And just as campaigns across our state are revving up (and we're staying very busy at your Indiana Republican Party), we're seeing more signs that our nation and state are revving up again, too, with promising economic news.

Nationally, some good news. Under the leadership of **President Trump** and **Vice President Pence** , 1.37 million more Americans were on payrolls in August, with the unemployment rate continuing to drop. [Read more here.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dcc57e6da0&e=1acd9bb3d6)

And here in Indiana, economic development is continuing at rapid speed, with the fundamentals of Indiana's business-friendly environment remaining strong. So far this year, [we're already approaching 20,000 job commitments](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=476cb5ac98&e=1acd9bb3d6) (at high wages!). Indiana's unemployment rate is also dropping and is below the national average.

There's no doubt that we have a long way to go. But thanks to the strong Republican leadership of **President Trump, Vice President Pence** and **Governor Holcomb** , we've got a solid foundation, and we're revving up again. -Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO: **_Events are kicking-off again! I had great time yesterday at the Perry-Spencer Republican Picnic, as did**Governor Holcomb** and **Lt. Governor Crouch**._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Connecting Hoosiers Every Step of the Way_** It’s been another busy week for **Governor Holcomb** as he's continuing to connect Hoosiers in ALL parts of Indiana -- whether that's in-person or through much-needed high-speed broadband!

This week he joined local leaders to celebrate the completion of another trail as part of his Next Level Trails program (this one in Clarksville in Southern Indiana).

And as part of **Governor Holcomb's** Next Level Broadband, he announced [the program's second round of funding](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5eef274697&e=1acd9bb3d6) this week totaling $51 million in matching grants for rural broadband infrastructure. In total, the $100 million Next Level Broadband Grant Program is the largest single investment in broadband in our state’s history. Governor Holcomb is bridging the digital divide for Hoosiers and connecting unserved areas to affordable, high-speed broadband. _**“This latest round of grants will give more Hoosiers access to more affordable, quality internet regardless of where they live, work or go to school.” -Governor Holcomb**_ To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=148177ae3d&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5e96dd934e&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aea688949a&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dc64eb7705&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Visit Our Indiana GOP Election Information Center!_** How are you planning to vote in this election? Absentee? Early? On Election Day? Regardless, with less than two months to go, it’s time to make a plan for how you’ll be voting – and we’ve got you covered.

For answers and information to your voting questions, you can now visit our [GOP Election Information Center website](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ae99547160&e=1acd9bb3d6), which will continue to be updated over the next 60 days! We have all the information you need all in one place.

Election Day is quickly approaching, so use the link below to ensure you have a voting plan! [\--> Click here to visit the GOP election information center <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2e0c5681ab&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| | **_60 Days to Go_** There are now just 60 days to go until Election Day. Events are picking up, including picnics and Lincoln Day Dinners (including these photos from the Porter County Lincoln Day Dinner and the Spencer-Perry Republican Picnic).

And as we enter the final countdown, there are plenty of opportunities to volunteer for our GOP team! Sign-up here to help us talk with Hoosier voters in all corners of Indiana on why it’s critical we keep Indiana moving forward. We can’t let Democrats move Indiana backward! [\--> Click here to sign up <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d277061fcc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| **_Upcoming Events_**
[September 5](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e05d98b25&e=1acd9bb3d6): Vermillion County Headquarters Grand Opening [September 11](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1ba0893292&e=1acd9bb3d6): Warren County Republican Patriot Day Golf Outing
[September 12](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bd3ca7aa82&e=1acd9bb3d6): BBQ with the Blue
[September ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=909bebfd78&e=1acd9bb3d6)[12](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82c9610225&e=1acd9bb3d6): Wells County Lincoln Day Dinner & Reagan Rally
[September 13](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e36c0c4ed8&e=1acd9bb3d6): 9th Annual Chairman's GOP Rally and Cookout
[September 26](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e4c1f04ff5&e=1acd9bb3d6): White County Lincoln Dinner
[October 2](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=12e51c305d&e=1acd9bb3d6): Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 3](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=42b49d30dc&e=1acd9bb3d6): Knox County Annual Spot Shoot
[October 3](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0321c95e17&e=1acd9bb3d6): Warren County Drive-Thru BBQ
[October 5](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dfd414cbbc&e=1acd9bb3d6): Orange County GOP Annual Fall Dinner
[October 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0938e6b8ae&e=1acd9bb3d6): Kosciusko County Republican Fall Fish Fry
[October 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5817e94476&e=1acd9bb3d6): Madison County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 15](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b7058c1f91&e=1acd9bb3d6): Lincoln-Reagan Fall Dinner
[October 24](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=009bfaa1c3&e=1acd9bb3d6): Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner
_Have an event to add? Please email it to [info@indiana.gop](mailto:info@indiana.gop)!_
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb**[leads $51 million matching grants for broadband expansion](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f3abae505b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[visited Northern Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dc13ec32a7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young** [discusses COVID-19 relief package](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d1e6d996b7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun**[ cosigns bipartisan Promoting Alzheimer’s Awareness of Elder Abuse Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=668df21f5e&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: As we head into Labor Day weekend, we're now officially 60 days away from Election Day. And just as campaigns across our state are revving up... | | | | | | | | Revving Up Again As we head into Labor Day weekend, we're now officially 60 days away from Election Day. And just as campaigns across our state are revving up (and we're staying very busy at your Indiana Republican Party), we're seeing more signs that our nation and state are revving up again, too, with promising economic news. Nationally, some good news. Under the leadership of President Trump and Vice President Pence , 1.37 million more Americans were on payrolls in August, with the unemployment rate continuing to drop. And here in Indiana, economic development is continuing at rapid speed, with the fundamentals of Indiana's business-friendly environment remaining strong. So far this year, (at high wages!). Indiana's unemployment rate is also dropping and is below the national average. There's no doubt that we have a long way to go. But thanks to the strong Republican leadership of President Trump, Vice President Pence and Governor Holcomb , we've got a solid foundation, and we're revving up again. -Chairman Kyle Hupfer PHOTO: Events are kicking-off again! I had great time yesterday at the Perry-Spencer Republican Picnic, as didGovernor Holcomb and Lt. Governor Crouch. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Connecting Hoosiers Every Step of the Way It’s been another busy week for Governor Holcomb as he's continuing to connect Hoosiers in ALL parts of Indiana -- whether that's in-person or through much-needed high-speed broadband! This week he joined local leaders to celebrate the completion of another trail as part of his Next Level Trails program (this one in Clarksville in Southern Indiana). And as part of Governor Holcomb's Next Level Broadband, he announced this week totaling $51 million in matching grants for rural broadband infrastructure. In total, the $100 million Next Level Broadband Grant Program is the largest single investment in broadband in our state’s history. Governor Holcomb is bridging the digital divide for Hoosiers and connecting unserved areas to affordable, high-speed broadband. “This latest round of grants will give more Hoosiers access to more affordable, quality internet regardless of where they live, work or go to school.” -Governor Holcomb To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , and ! | | | Visit Our Indiana GOP Election Information Center! How are you planning to vote in this election? Absentee? Early? On Election Day? Regardless, with less than two months to go, it’s time to make a plan for how you’ll be voting – and we’ve got you covered. For answers and information to your voting questions, you can now visit our , which will continue to be updated over the next 60 days! We have all the information you need all in one place. Election Day is quickly approaching, so use the link below to ensure you have a voting plan! | | | | | 60 Days to Go There are now just 60 days to go until Election Day. Events are picking up, including picnics and Lincoln Day Dinners (including these photos from the Porter County Lincoln Day Dinner and the Spencer-Perry Republican Picnic). And as we enter the final countdown, there are plenty of opportunities to volunteer for our GOP team! Sign-up here to help us talk with Hoosier voters in all corners of Indiana on why it’s critical we keep Indiana moving forward. We can’t let Democrats move Indiana backward! | | Upcoming Events : Vermillion County Headquarters Grand Opening : Warren County Republican Patriot Day Golf Outing : BBQ with the Blue : Wells County Lincoln Day Dinner & Reagan Rally : 9th Annual Chairman's GOP Rally and Cookout : White County Lincoln Dinner : Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner : Knox County Annual Spot Shoot : Warren County Drive-Thru BBQ : Orange County GOP Annual Fall Dinner : Kosciusko County Republican Fall Fish Fry : Madison County Lincoln Day Dinner : Lincoln-Reagan Fall Dinner : Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner Have an event to add? Please email it to mailto:info@indiana.gop! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: The only way we'll flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
With only two months left until Election Day, we're working hard to take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the GOP majority. But the only way we'll flip the Senate in November is by supporting Democratic challengers and re-electing all of our strong Democratic incumbents.
**[This team is playing an important role in the fight for the Senate with our Sprint to 2020 program. Can I count on you to step up today and support Mark Kelly in Arizona, Ben Ray Lujan in New Mexico, and Doug Jones in Alabama? Contribute $5 right now.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200903-senate-slate?refcode=em200903i_470&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
In Arizona, Mark Kelly is still ahead of his opponent, but new polls show Republican Senator Martha McSally is narrowing the gap. This bellwether race is a must-win in Democrats' fight for control of the Senate -- and the GOP is fighting hard to hold on to this crucial seat. It's up to all of us to help Mark's campaign over the finish line if we're going to flip the Senate.
In New Mexico, we have another important race for Democrats: Ben Ray Lujan, the Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House, is running for an open Senate seat -- and we need to do everything we can to keep this seat blue. The GOP thinks that if this race goes under the radar, they can turn a blue seat red in their fight to keep Mitch McConnell's GOP Senate majority.
Republicans are also doing everything in their power to unseat our Democratic Senators in red states, like Doug Jones in Alabama. President Trump won Alabama in 2016, and the GOP considers this competitive state an opportunity to pick up another Republican seat -- which would make it nearly impossible for Democrats to win the Senate majority in November.
**[We absolutely must elect a Democratic majority in the Senate -- but we can only do that by electing candidates like Mark Kelly and Ben Ray Lujan and defending Democratic champions like Doug Jones. Will you pitch in $5 right now?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200903-senate-slate?refcode=em200903i_470&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200903-senate-slate?refcode=em200903i_470&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693270/22080b68/7a182572/4602135e/2934126633/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693270/22080b68/7a182572/4602135d/2934126633/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Payrolls Increase by Nearly 1.4 Million as the Unemployment Rate Tumbles, America's Fight: Civilization Versus Anarchy, Restore Our Lives Using... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b5344cd71&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Payrolls Increase by Nearly 1.4 Million as the Unemployment Rate Tumbles**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf0116629e&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.cnbc.com/2020/09/04/jobs-report-august-2020-.html")
-CNBC
“Nonfarm payrolls increased by 1.37 million in August and the unemployment rate tumbled to 8.4% as the U.S. economy continued to climb its way out of the pandemic downturn,” Jeff Cox reports. “‘These jobs numbers reflect a big win for American workers . . . Unemployment breaking the 10% barrier so decisively is a big psychological lift as well,’ said Robert Frick, corporate economist at Navy Federal Credit Union.”
---
|
---
| [**America's Fight: Civilization Versus Anarchy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2328a32913&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.newsweek.com/americas-fight-civilization-versus-anarchy-opinion-1529299")
-_Newsweek_
“The level of violence we are seeing around America cannot be understood and analyzed as a normal event within a free society,” former House Speaker Newt Gingrich writes. “The new anti-American rebellion is better organized, better connected, more widespread and has a lot more strategic thinking than its precursor did in the 1960s.”

**🎬 WATCH:** [**President Trump visits Kenosha, Wisconsin, after riots**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47e94cff06&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Restore Our Lives Using Medical Science, Data and Common Sense**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=055fb56a66&e=3ee4985eea "https://thehill.com/opinion/healthcare/514948-restore-our-lives-using-medical-science-data-and-common-sense")
-_The Hill_
“Americans are anxious to get back to work and to send their children to school. The science backs them up . . . Unlike his critics, who have focused on the wrong goal and engaged in unfounded fear-mongering, President Trump has been implementing a three-pronged, data-driven strategy that is saving lives while safely reopening the economy and society,” writes Dr. Scott Atlas of the White House Coronavirus Task Force.

📖 **STUDENT OP-ED:** [**‘I’d Rather Be Learning’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3735bb1c76&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.wsj.com/articles/id-rather-be-learning-11599062662?mod=opinion_lead_pos8")
---
|
---
| [**Trump to Award Medal of Honor on 9/11 to Soldier Who Rescued 75 Hostages**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29a3aa0859&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxnews.com/politics/trump-to-award-medal-of-honor-on-9-11-to-soldier-who-rescued-75-hostages")
-Fox News
“On the 19th anniversary of the 9/11 terror attacks, President Trump plans to award the Medal of Honor to U.S. Army Sgt. Major Thomas Payne for conspicuous gallantry for his role in leading a dangerous nighttime raid in Iraq that freed 75 hostages.” The President will also visit the Flight 93 National Memorial in Pennsylvania, Andrew O’Reilly reports.
---
|
---
| [**GM, Ford Produce 80,000 Ventilators, Conclude Historic 'Arsenal of Health' Effort**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a4a2f2830&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Detroit News_
“Capping off a historic effort by Detroit's automakers to build ventilators for the national stockpile, General Motors Co. and Ford Motor Co. say they have fulfilled their commitments to manufacture tens of thousands of the breathing machines that have helped save the lives of COVID-19 patients across the country,” Breana Noble and
Jordyn Grzelewski write.

**🎬** **WATCH:**[**Ivanka Trump visits GM training facility in Michigan!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dde4915503&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

name: Joe (Team Freitas)
subject: is our campaign done?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Trump is no patriot. Is David Perdue?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Does Perdue agree with Trump's disdain for our troops? |
---
_**"Why should I go to that cemetery? It's filled with losers."** \- The President of the United States_
Friend, a flurry of reports in the last day have confirmed what we already knew:

Donald Trump is no patriot. His only allegiance is to himself.

Trump called Americans who were killed in action "suckers." He demeaned Americans who were captured or missing. He didn't want to be seen around wounded veterans.

Friend, this is nothing new. Trump attacked John McCain back in 2015 for having been a POW. Remember what he said -- even while the cameras were rolling? _"I like people who weren't captured."_

**Does my opponent, David Perdue, agree with Trump? Because Perdue has had years to denounce him.**

**American service members who risk their lives for our country deserve the highest respect. Trump and his enablers in Congress deserve none.**

**[Help me defeat Trump's favorite senator.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2a4f/5b2c1286/38813ae2/25f0f8ac/4195421641/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_04_jo_pat?refcode=em_2020_09_04_jo_pat")**

Friend, nothing short of a landslide victory in November will suffice.

We have to send a message that echoes down through history.

This isn't about political party.

This is a fork in the road.

Will America be a republic defined by its commitments to human freedom, human decency, and human rights?

Or will we continue down the path of authoritarianism, corruption, and division?

_This election is our last chance to choose the better path. To set about building the Beloved Community that Congressman John Lewis dreamed of._

**[Help me win, so together we can restore America's soul.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2a4f/5b2c1286/38813ae2/25f0f8b2/4195421641/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_04_jo_pat?refcode=em_2020_09_04_jo_pat&amount=10")**

name: Mark Warner for VA
subject: No one is above the law.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
That hasn't stopped President Trump from flagrantly disregarding the Hatch Act.
|
---

| | Derek, **we already knew that Donald Trump feels that he 's above the law. He's demonstrated it time and again.**

Last week, he continued the pattern during the Republican National Convention, turning the White House into a cheap prop for his re-election campaign. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae3/53d9897e/55ca1f05/1c8805a3/4064939667/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-hatchact?refcode=20200904_f_1_nd__758__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
It wasn't just the President. He's packed his administration with others who believe they're above the law:
* Secretary of State Mike Pompeo gave a convention speech from Jerusalem, where he was traveling on the taxpayer's dime.
* First Lady Melania Trump addressed the Republican National Convention from the Rose Garden.
* Acting Secretary of Homeland Security Chad Wolf staged an official naturalization ceremony as part of the televised convention.

There's a reason why neither party has ever used the White House as the backdrop for their convention: **it 's against the law.**

A 1939 law called the Hatch Act made it a crime for government employees to do political work at taxpayer expense, and it bars the President from ordering federal workers to engage in political activity like, for example, throwing a political convention on the White House lawn.

It's disgraceful, Derek. With Senate Republicans enabling his lawless behavior, it's clear **the President believes he is above the law.**

We need to send a message that **laws and ethics still matter.** To do that, we need to run this lawless President and his enablers out of town and flip the Senate blue. That starts with re-electing Mark Warner. **[Can you pitch in to Mark's campaign and help us send a strong message on Election Day?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae3/53d9897e/55ca1f05/1c8805a2/4064939667/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-hatchact?refcode=20200904_f_1_nd__758__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae3/53d9897e/55ca1f05/1c8805a1/4064939667/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-hatchact?refcode=20200904_f_1_nd__758__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae3/53d9897e/55ca1f05/1c8805a0/4064939667/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")
